title: Exact Exposition of the Orthodox Faith
description: The last great systematic theology of the patristic era: a summa of everything the Church Fathers taught about God, creation, Christ, and the last things.
introduction: The last great systematic theology of the patristic era: a summa of everything the Church Fathers taught about God, creation, Christ, and the last things.

translation.text: God is infinite and incomprehensible, and all that is comprehensible about him is his infinity and incomprehensibility.
